headline: SIGNAL SCAN — Jun 16

VIX 16.20 (-8.4%) — Fear gauge crushed as risk appetite surges, positioning unwind accelerates volatility compression XMR $348.10 (-7.5%) — Privacy-coin facing continued regulatory and exchange-listing headwinds, sentiment deteriorating on structural delisting risk SOXX $628.45 (+7.1%) — Semiconductor complex surging on renewed AI-demand optimism and improving supply-chain confidence UNI $2.87 (+6.7%) — DeFi protocol benefiting from renewed on-chain activity and rotation into decentralized exchange tokens HYPE $71.78 (+6.6%) — Perpetual DEX token catching a strong bid as on-chain derivatives volumes and speculative positioning expand EWY $211.45 (+6.3%) — South Korean equities rallying sharply on semiconductor export momentum and improved regional risk appetite _Semiconductors and DeFi tokens are co-leading, signaling a synchronized risk-on rotation across both equities and crypto_ POSITIONING BTC ETF flows (CoinGlass via g2-data, provider-reported) (Mon close, 1 trading day old): -$65M outflow (GBTC -$124M, IBIT +$66M, BTC +$11M). Gold (COMEX): +103.7K net, Δ -7.7K (HEAVY_LIQUIDATION) Copper #1 (COMEX): +71.1K net, Δ -6.0K (HEAVY_LIQUIDATION) INTEL ▲ Semiconductor & Tech Relief Rally [SOXX, SMH, EWY, NVDA] ▲ Strait of Hormuz Tentative Deal & Commodity Relief [COPX, OIL, LNG, BTC] ▼ BOJ Rate Hike to 31-Year High [BTC, JPY, USD, JGB] IMPLICATION The macro setup favors leaning into the cyclical and tech leadership — semiconductors and copper miners are confirming a growth-rotation thesis, not just a relief bounce. Energy's sharp underperformance and defensive weakness suggest the market is pricing out caution. Watch whether crypto's DeFi-led gains broaden into blue-chip digital assets or remain a niche speculative move; that distinction will shape conviction into the week's close.
